zh.Auchterarder, , Perth and Kinross, Scotl: 英國蘇格蘭培斯 安德 金洛斯奧特拉德
zh.lifeSummary: 當Sir David Murray VI of Tullibardine於1359年出生在英國蘇格蘭培爾圖利巴迪時，他的父親Walter Murray24歲，母親Margaret Le Baird31歲。他於1394年與Isabel Stewart在蘇格蘭培爾培斯結婚。他們至少是3個兒子和1個女兒的父母。他去世於1446年6月15日在他的家鄉享年87歲，埋葬在英國蘇格蘭培斯 安德 金洛斯奧特拉德。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Sir David Murray VI of Tullibardine于1359年出生在英国苏格兰培爾圖利巴迪时，他的父亲Walter Murray24岁，母亲Margaret Le Baird31岁。他于1394年与Isabel Stewart在苏格兰培爾培斯结婚。他们至少是3个儿子和1个女儿的父母。他去世于1446年6月15日在他的家乡享年87岁，埋葬在英国苏格兰培斯 安德 金洛斯奧特拉德。

nameMeanings.name: Murray
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Scottish: habitational name from Moray in northeastern Scotland, which derives from Celtic mori- ‘sea’ + treb- ‘settlement’. The founder of the Scottish house of Murray was a Fleming named Freskin who was granted Strathbrock in West Lothian and Duffus in Moray by David I. The family took its name from the region in the late 12th century.
Irish and Scottish: shortened form of   McMurray  .
Irish: Anglicized form of Gaelic Ó Muireadhaigh ‘descendant of Muireadhach’ a personal name meaning ‘mariner’. Occasionally it may be a shortened form of McMurray .

variants.name: Murry
meanings: Scottish and Irish: variant of   Murray  .

variants.name: Murrah
meanings: Probably an altered form of Scottish   Murray  .

variants.name: Murie
meanings: Scottish: habitational name from Murie in Errol (Perthshire).
Scottish and Irish: variant of   Murray  .

variants.name: Merhi
meanings: Arabic (mainly Lebanon and Syria): from a variant of the personal name Mirhi of unknown meaning. Bearers of this surname are both Muslims and Christians. Compare Murray 5.

variants.name: McMurray
meanings: Irish (northern) and Scottish: Anglicized form of Gaelic Mac Muireadhaigh or Mac Muireadhaich, a patronymic from the personal name Muireadhach ‘seafarer’ (see Murdoch ). Compare McCurry 1.

variants.name: Murra
meanings: Italian (Sicily): topographic name from Sicilian murra ‘large rock, mass of rocks’ or a habitational name from a place called with this word.
Albanian: nickname from murrë (definite form murra) ‘dark gray cow’.

nameMeanings.name: David
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Biblical name, borne by the greatest of all the kings of Israel, whose history is recounted with great vividness in the first and second books of Samuel and elsewhere. As a boy he killed the giant Philistine Goliath with his slingshot. As king of Judah, and later of all Israel, he expanded the power of the Israelites and established the security of their kingdom. He was also noted as a poet, many of the Psalms being attributed to him. The Hebrew derivation of the name is uncertain; it is said by some to represent a nursery word meaning ‘darling’. It is a very popular Jewish name, but is almost equally common among Gentiles in the English-speaking world. It is particularly common in Wales and Scotland, having been borne by the patron saint of Wales (  see  Dewi   ) and by two medieval kings of Scotland.

en.lifeSummary: When Sir David Murray VI of Tullibardine was born in 1359, in Tullibardine, Perthshire, Scotland, United Kingdom, his father, Walter Murray, was 24 and his mother, Margaret Le Baird, was 31. He married Isabel Stewart in 1394, in Perth, Perthshire, Scotland. They were the parents of at least 3 sons and 1 daughter. He died on 15 June 1446, in his hometown, at the age of 87, and was buried in Auchterarder, Perth and Kinross, Scotland, United Kingdom.

fr.Auchterarder, , Perth and Kinross, Scotl: Auchterarder, Perth and Kinross, Écosse, Royaume-Uni
fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Sir David Murray VI of Tullibardine est né en 1359, à Tullibardine, Perthshire, Écosse, Royaume-Uni, son père, Walter Murray, avait 24 ans et sa mère, Margaret Le Baird, avait 31 ans. Il a épousé Isabel Stewart en 1394, à Perth, Perthshire, Écosse. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils et 1 fille. Il est décédé le 15 juin 1446, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 87 ans, et a été enterré à Auchterarder, Perth and Kinross, Écosse, Royaume-Uni.

de.Auchterarder, , Perth and Kinross, Scotl: Auchterarder, Perth and Kinross, Schottland, United Kingdom
de.lifeSummary: Als Sir David Murray VI of Tullibardine 1359 in Tullibardine, Perthshire, Schottland, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war sein Vater Walter Murray 24 und seine Mutter Margaret Le Baird 31. Er hat 1394 in Perth, Perthshire, Scotland Isabel Stewart geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Er starb am 15. Juni 1446 im Alter von 87 Jahren in seinem Geburtsort und wurde in Auchterarder, Perth and Kinross, Schottland, United Kingdom begraben.

ja.lifeSummary: Sir David Murray VI of Tullibardineが1359年にイギリススコットランドペルスシュアイアトゥリバーディンで生まれた時，父Walter Murrayは24歳，母Margaret Le Bairdは31歳であった。1394年にスコットランドペルスシュアイアペルスでIsabel Stewartと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼は1446年6月15日に故郷で87歳で死去し，イギリススコットランドペルス アンド キンロスアウチテラルダーにて埋葬された。

ko.Auchterarder, , Perth and Kinross, Scotl: 영국 스코틀랜드 퍼스 앤드 킨로스 오트라르더
ko.lifeSummary: Sir David Murray VI of Tullibardine(이)가 1359년 영국 스코틀랜드 퍼스실르 툴리바딘에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Walter Murray(은)는 24세였고, 그의 어머니 Margaret Le Baird(은)는 31세였다. 그는 1394년 스컷랜드 퍼스실르 퍼스에서 Isabel Stewart(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1446년 6월 15일 그의 고향에서 87세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 스코틀랜드 퍼스 앤드 킨로스 오트라르더에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Sir David Murray VI of Tullibardine nasceu em 1359, em Tullibardine, Perthshire, Escócia, United Kingdom, seu pai, Walter Murray, tinha 24 anos e sua mãe, Margaret Le Baird, tinha 31 anos. Ele casou-se com Isabel Stewart em 1394, em Perth, Perthshire, Scotland. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos e 1 filha. Ele faleceu em 15 de junho de 1446, em sua cidade natal, com 87 anos, e foi sepultado em Auchterarder, Perth and Kinross, Escócia, United Kingdom.

ru.Auchterarder, , Perth and Kinross, Scotl: аучтирардир, пирт анд кинросс, Шотландия, Великобритания
ru.lifeSummary: Когда Sir David Murray VI of Tullibardine родился в 1359 г. в местности туллибардаин, пиртшир, Шотландия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени Walter Murray было 24 года, а матери, которую звали Margaret Le Baird, 31. Он женился на женщине по имени Isabel Stewart в 1394 г. в местности пирт, пиртшир, Шотландия. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына и 1 дочь. Он умер 15 июня 1446 г. в его родном городе в возрасте 87 лет и был похоронен в местности аучтирардир, пирт анд кинросс, Шотландия, Великобритания.
